# Small Poles

> The first fantasy football platform built for the Ghana Premier League (GPL). Pick real GPL players, predict results, and compete with friends every gameweek.

Small Poles is a Ghanaian fantasy football product focused exclusively on the Ghana Premier League. It is currently in beta and targets Ghanaian football fans.

## Pages

- [Home](https://smallpoles.online/): Landing page with product overview, features, and waitlist signup
- [News](https://smallpoles.online/news/): GPL and fantasy football news articles
- [News Articles](https://smallpoles.online/news/): Individual post pages covering GPL news, match previews, and platform updates

## About

- Product: GPL Fantasy Football web app
- Stage: Beta / waitlist
- Audience: Ghanaian football fans
- League: Ghana Premier League (GPL)
